items.claim: Abdul Hussein has finished all but one of his professional wins.
items.quote: he has finished all but one of his wins.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking the fight on short notice and flying to Abu Dhabi.
items.quote: Cody Gibson, who's taken this fight in short notice, flying all the way to Abu Dhabi

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and coming off back-to-back finish losses.
items.quote: coming off backto back finish losses, 38 years old at this point

items.claim: Brenson Hiro has one of the worst takedown defenses in the UFC at around 20%.
items.quote: He barely has one of the worst takedown defenses, not only in the light heavyweight division, but the entire UFC. It's like 20%.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio is 39 years old and has been hurt by multiple fighters in recent fights.
items.quote: Santiago Ponzanibio, who's 39 years old... if you're getting hurt by guys like Daniel Rodriguez, Alex Morono, and Carl Harris

items.claim: Sam Patterson possesses a ton of power in his hands and an elite submission game.
items.quote: Patterson has a ton of power in his hands, and obviously an elite submission game as well.
